strengths: 19+ years of hands-on engineering experience across web, mobile, embedded, and high-throughput distributed systems, exceeding the 15-year minimum
Entrepreneurial track record as founder of GISCollective, an open-source geo-data platform, plus multiple open-source libraries and community workshops/talks
Recent, directly relevant AI-agent infrastructure work (MCP code generators, agentic workflow frameworks) with strong builder and code fluency
concerns: Career has been at senior/staff IC level with no evidence of director-level scope, organizational influence, or strategy-setting responsibilities
AI expertise is recent and tooling-focused; no demonstrated 'recognized expertise in AI' such as shipped AI products at scale, publications, or ML depth
No advanced degree in an AI-related field and limited evidence of advising strategic customers or shaping cloud platform strategy

key_factors.factor: Seniority gap vs. director-level IC role

response.justification: The candidate comfortably clears the experience-years bar and shows genuine builder credentials, entrepreneurial initiative, and emerging AI-agent tooling work. However, this is a director-level AI strategy role requiring recognized AI expertise, demonstrated AI products or platforms, and the ability to advise strategic customers and drive organizational direction — areas where the resume shows a strong senior/staff engineer rather than a principal-level strategist. The gap is in scope and AI depth, not competence.
